query: I have an hour for PR review — what should I look at next?
expected_behavior: Fetches the open-PR list with lightweight fields (number, title, author, labels, createdAt, additions, deletions, isDraft).
Applies Mode D blended scoring: merge_readiness * impact * (1 + min(age_days/14, 1.0)).
Presents the top-10 ranked candidates with reason columns; waits for the maintainer to pick 3-5 for the deep pass.
Does NOT run heavy GraphQL fields (statusCheckRollup, mergeStateStatus) in bulk — those are fetched per-finalist to avoid 502s.
